pg60-p1-s1: Having had a spiritual awakening as the result of these steps, we tried to carry this message to alcoholics, and to practice these principles in all our affairs.
pg60-p1: Having had a spiritual awakening as the result of these steps, we tried to carry this message to alcoholics, and to practice these principles in all our affairs.
pg60-p2-s1: Many of us exclaimed, "What an order!
pg60-p2-s2: I can't go through with it."
pg60-p2-s4:
No one among us has been able
to maintain anything like perfect adherence to these principles.
pg60-p2-s6:
The point is, that we are willing to
grow along spiritual lines.
pg60-p2-s7: The principles we have set down are guides to progress.
pg60-p2-s8:
We claim spiritual progress rather
than spiritual perfection.
pg60-p2:
Many of us exclaimed, "What an order! I can't go through with it." Do not be discouraged. No one among us has been able
to maintain anything like perfect adherence to these principles. We are not saints. The point is, that we are willing to
grow along spiritual lines. The principles we have set down are guides to progress. We claim spiritual progress rather
than spiritual perfection.
pg60-p3-s1:
Our description of the alcoholic, the chapter to the agnostic, and our personal adventures before and after make clear
three pertinent ideas:
pg60-p3:
Our description of the alcoholic, the chapter to the agnostic, and our personal adventures before and after make clear
three pertinent ideas:
pg60-p4-s2:
That we were alcoholic and could not manage our own lives.
 (b)
pg60-p4-s3:
That probably no human power could have relieved our alcoholism.
 (c)
pg60-p4-s4: That God could and would if He were sought.
pg60-p4:
(a) That we were alcoholic and could not manage our own lives.
 (b) That probably no human power could have relieved our alcoholism.
 (c) That God could and would if He were sought.
pg60-p5-s1:
Being convinced, we were at Step Three, which is that we decided to turn our will and our life over to God as we
understood Him.
pg60-p5-s2: Just what do we mean by that, and just what do we do?
pg60-p5:
Being convinced, we were at Step Three, which is that we decided to turn our will and our life over to God as we
understood Him. Just what do we mean by that, and just what do we do?
pg60-p6-s1: The first requirement is that we be convinced that any life run on self-will can hardly be a success.
pg60-p6-s2:
On that basis we
are almost always in collision with something or somebody, even though our motives are good.
pg60-p6-s3:
Most people try to live by
self-propulsion.
pg60-p6-s4:
Each person is like an actor who wants to run the whole show; is forever trying to arrange the lights,
the ballet, the scenery and the rest of the players in his own way.
pg60-p6:
The first requirement is that we be convinced that any life run on self-will can hardly be a success. On that basis we
are almost always in collision with something or somebody, even though our motives are good. Most people try to live by
self-propulsion. Each person is like an actor who wants to run the whole show; is forever trying to arrange the lights,
the ballet, the scenery and the rest of the players in his own way. If
